preconditions: Login page displays username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, home navigation button, and back navigation button

testCases.title: Verify login page loads and all required UI elements are visible
steps: Open a browser and navigate to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined
Observe the login page layout and visible controls
testCases.expectedResult: Login page loads successfully with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined and the username textbox, password textbox, SIGN IN button, home navigation button, and back navigation button are visible and interactable.

testCases.title: Verify successful login using valid credentials via SIGN IN button
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: User is authenticated successfully and the application redirects to the home page. Browser URL changes to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home and login page elements are no longer visible.

testCases.title: Verify login submission using keyboard Enter key after entering valid credentials
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
Press Enter on the keyboard while the cursor focus is inside the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Login form is submitted through the keyboard action and the application redirects to the home page with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home indicating successful authentication.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with valid username and incorrect password
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel2 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails and the user remains on the login page with URL http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/login?data=undefined. A visible sign-in failure or error indication is displayed and the application does not navigate to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login fails with invalid username and valid password
steps: Enter hacklarr123 in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected and the application remains on the login page. Browser URL does not change to the home page and a visible login failure indication appears.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when both username and password are invalid
steps: Enter invaliduser in the username textbox
Enter invalidpass in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: System rejects the authentication attempt and the login page remains visible. Browser URL remains the login URL and a visible authentication failure indication is displayed.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt when username is empty and password is provided
steps: Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication does not succeed and the application remains on the login page with a visible validation or authentication failure indication. No navigation to the home page occurs.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt when password is empty and username is provided
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected and the user remains on the login page. A visible validation or authentication failure indication appears and the browser does not redirect to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login attempt when both username and password fields are empty
testCases.expectedResult: Login submission is rejected and the login page remains visible with a validation or authentication failure indication. Browser does not navigate to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify password textbox masks entered characters
steps: Type Icstunnel1 into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Password characters are not displayed as plain text. Each entered character appears masked (for example as dots or asterisks) confirming the field behaves as a password field.

testCases.title: Verify navigation to home page using home navigation button from login page
testCases.expectedResult: Application navigates away from the login page and loads the home page. Browser URL becomes http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify navigation to home page using back navigation button from login page
testCases.expectedResult: Application navigates away from the login page and loads the home page. Browser URL changes to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify login behavior when credentials contain leading and trailing whitespace
steps: Enter space followed by hacklarr followed by space in the username textbox
Enter space followed by Icstunnel1 followed by space in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Application processes the submitted credentials. If the system trims leading and trailing whitespace, login succeeds and the user is redirected to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home; otherwise authentication fails and the user remains on the login page with a visible failure indication.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when username contains only whitespace characters
steps: Enter multiple spaces in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication is rejected and the login page remains visible. A visible login failure or validation indication appears and the application does not redirect to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when password contains only whitespace characters
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
Enter multiple spaces in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication attempt fails and the user remains on the login page. A visible authentication failure message or indication is displayed and the browser does not navigate to the home page.

testCases.title: Verify system behavior when SIGN IN button is clicked repeatedly with valid credentials
steps: Enter hacklarr in the username textbox
Enter Icstunnel1 in the password textbox
Click the SIGN IN button multiple times rapidly
testCases.expectedResult: Application processes the login request once and redirects to the home page. Only a single successful navigation to http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home occurs and no duplicate navigation or visible error appears.

testCases.title: Verify login using credentials pasted into username and password fields
steps: Copy hacklarr and paste it into the username textbox
Copy Icstunnel1 and paste it into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Pasted values are accepted in both fields and authentication succeeds. User is redirected to the home page and the browser URL becomes http://172.21.166.115/washtabui/home.

testCases.title: Verify login fails when extremely long text values are entered in username and password fields
steps: Enter a very long string exceeding typical username length into the username textbox
Enter a very long string exceeding typical password length into the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication does not succeed and the application remains stable on the login page without crashes. Browser does not redirect to the home page and the login form remains visible.

testCases.title: Verify login behavior when credentials are entered with different letter casing
steps: Enter HACKLARR in the username textbox
Enter ICSTUNNEL1 in the password textbox
testCases.expectedResult: If authentication is case sensitive, the login attempt fails and the user remains on the login page with a visible authentication failure indication and no redirect to the home page.
